Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Hmm... Lilies are too fragrant, and roses aren't really my thing...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Я вирішила оновити свою кімнату та думала купити квітів.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}I think I'll go with the gerberas. What color do you think should I get?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Мабуть, у нас схожі смаки, правда ж...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Then it's decided! I'll get these.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}White? Isn't that kinda boring?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Bright red? Wouldn't that stand out too much?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Hmm... Come to think of it, gerberas by themselves might be a little plain...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Які квіти, на твою думку, пасували б?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 6 25 25}Oh wait, you've never seen my room, have you? Well then, why am I even asking you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}You wish! I'm not falling for that trick.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 1 25 25}Ха-ха, ти такий же поганець, як і Джюнпей.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Чесно кажучи, будь-які квіти підійдуть, якщо вони від тебе, {f 4 1}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Схоже, Юкарі сьогодні в доброму гуморі.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Здається, ми стали ближчими...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Не використано[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}Gosh, what should I get...? I'm actually a pretty indecisive person.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}Hmmm... A ranunculus wouldn't be bad either...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Після проведення часу з Юкарі[n]я вирішив повернутися до гуртожитку...[n]{f 1 1}
